text:
B. 2025 MCAHPS Format Tables 
27 
sa_mdcr_stus: Reason for Beneficiary Entitlement 
SAS Format: $MCR 
0 : MISSING 
10: AGED WITHOUT ESRD 
11: AGED WITH ESRD 
20: DISABLED WITHOUT ESRD 
21: DISABLED WITH ESRD 
31: ESRD ONLY 
sa_org_entlmt: Original Reason for Entitlement 
SAS Format: $OEN 
0: AGE 
1: DISABILITY 
2: ESRD 
3: DISABILITY & ESRD 
U: UNKNOWN 
sa_partd_stus: Part D Status 
SAS Format: $ID_F 
N: NO 
U: UNKNOWN 
Y: YES 
sa_pbp_type: Plan Type of Surveyed Plan 
SAS Format: $PBT 
01: HMO
